_note: no literal secret patterns present by design — prose mentions access keys but contains no AKIA/key literal (security-reviewed 2026-07-03)
rule: always use IAM roles for service authentication — never hardcode access keys in deployment configs
context: A long-term access key was found hardcoded in the container environment variables in the deployment manifest. This is a critical security violation. All cloud service authentication must use IAM instance roles or workload identity federation. Secrets must never appear in manifests, Dockerfiles, or environment variable blocks in CI configs.
